description: '''Nu-new age''' (also known as '''New Wave of New Age''', '''new age revival''' or '''New Millennium Exotica''') is a style of music that emerged in the 2000s to describe a revival of new age music. It originated through "converts of the [[post-noise]] scene" with artists such as [[Emeralds (band)|Emeralds]], Stellar Om Source and [[Oneohtrix Point Never]]. Other artists who have been associated with the style include [[James Ferraro]] and Dolphins Into the Future.'''''' Independent record label Leaving Records was labelled a "bastion" of the movement.
